ui.seoDescription: VoiceCraft Client/Server setup and configuration for Minecraft Bedrock.

download.title: Download VoiceCraft
download.subtitle: Choose the latest client or server build for your platform. Client downloads are automatically highlighted for your current OS when detection is available.
download.detected: A recommended client build has been highlighted for your device.
download.clientSubtitle: Desktop and mobile client builds for players. Android 32-bit is no longer published.
download.serverSubtitle: Standalone server builds for self-hosting and deployment.
download.androidNote: Android 32-bit is no longer available. Use the arm64 Android build.
download.serverSourceNote: If you need a platform that is not listed here, check the full releases page or build from source.
download.addonSubtitle: Bedrock addon package and source links.
download.addonNote: Use releases for packaged builds. Source ZIP is useful for custom modifications.

landing.title: VoiceCraft Documentation
landing.subtitle: Cross-platform proximity voice chat for Minecraft Bedrock Edition. Installation, configuration, operations, and McHttp/McWss integration in a single documentation hub.

slides.title: Client Home Screen
slides.description: Server overview, quick connect flow, and current session status in one place.

slides.title: Settings and Network
slides.description: Positioning parameters, McWss endpoint, and advanced client behavior tuning.

slides.title: Audio Pipeline
slides.description: Input/output devices, sensitivity, denoising, AGC, and microphone tests.
